description: Per-scanner path-invariance contract for env-validation-checker — N1-class path (vuln in /api/test/ route, NOT a test-file). Route file `src/app/api/test/route.ts` references more than 5 process.env.* variables without a central Zod-validated env.ts. Post-v0.16.3 env-validation-checker must flag this as CWE-1188.
